prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科（含物理类）最低位次依次约 1013→703→3120→6070→4904 名。2021–2022 年位次极优（千名以内），2023 年起因考试模式改革及招生口径变化，位次大幅后移至 3000–6000 名区间。2024 年约 6070 名为近年最低点，2025 年回升至约 4904 名，近 2 年累计前移约 1166 名，竞争呈加剧态势；该校在吉林省理科组招生计划：2021 年 78 人、2022 年 73 人、2023 年 231 人（含多校区口径）、2024 年物理类 89 人、2025 年物理类 101 人；2026 年物理类计划仅 29 人，较 2025 年大幅缩减约 71%，缩招幅度极为显著，将导致竞争进一步加剧，位次预计明显前移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 哈尔滨工业大学为 985、211、双一流高校，软科中国大学排名 2026 年约第 12 名，稳居全国顶尖工科院校前列，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026 年声誉评价为中性/混合，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度总排名第 10（高热），短视频曝光量大，反映报考关注度持续走高，对竞争有正向推动作用；拥有 17 个 A- 及以上学科：力学 A+、机械工程 A+、材料科学与工程 A+、环境科学与工程 A+、控制科学与工程 A、计算机科学与技术 A 等，工科实力极为突出，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 工科试验班（未来技术拔尖班、院士特色班等）为近年高热专业，计算机、人工智能、自动化等方向社会热度持续升温；吉林省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 110868 人，与 2025 年基本持平；省控线近年变化不大；哈尔滨工业大学位于黑龙江省哈尔滨市，与吉林省相邻，东北地区考生对本校认可度较高，地域偏好无明显不利影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次约 4904 名、2026 年招生计划大幅缩减约 71%（从 101 人降至 29 人）导致竞争急剧加剧、学校层次极高且抖音热度持续走高、优势学科实力突出等关键因素，预计 2026 年最低录取位次将较 2025 年明显前移。预测最低位次约2907名，区间2576–3238名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest rankings for science (including physics category) were approximately 1013→703→3120→6070→4904. Rankings were extremely favorable in 2021–2022 (within the top 1000), but from 2023 onward, due to exam mode reform and changes in enrollment scope, rankings shifted significantly to the 3000–6000 range. In 2024, the ranking of about 6070 was the lowest in recent years, and in 2025 it rebounded to about 4904, with a cumulative forward shift of about 1166 positions over the past two years, indicating intensifying competition. The university's enrollment plan for science groups in Jilin Province: 78 in 2021, 73 in 2022, 231 in 2023 (including multi-campus scope), 89 in 2024 for physics category, 101 in 2025 for physics category; in 2026, the physics category plan is only 29, a sharp reduction of about 71% compared to 2025, which will further intensify competition and is expected to significantly move rankings forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Harbin Institute of Technology is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it is approximately 12th, firmly among the top engineering institutions in the country, with strong appeal to high-scoring candidates. In 2026, its reputation is assessed as neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion. Its Douyin heat ranking is 10th overall (high heat), with high short video exposure, reflecting continuously rising attention from applicants, which positively drives competition. It has 17 disciplines rated A- or above: Mechanics A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Control Science and Engineering A, Computer Science and Technology A, etc., with exceptionally strong engineering capabilities that highly match its enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering experimental classes (Future Technology Top Class, Academician Special Class, etc.) are highly popular majors in recent years, with social heat continuously rising for directions like computer science, artificial intelligence, and automation. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Jilin Province is about 110,868, roughly the same as in 2025; provincial control lines have changed little in recent years. Harbin Institute of Technology is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, adjacent to Jilin Province, and candidates from the Northeast region have a high recognition of this university, with no significant adverse regional preference effects.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering key factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of about 4904, a sharp reduction of about 71% in the 2026 enrollment plan (from 101 to 29) leading to intensified competition, the university's very high level and continuously rising Douyin heat, and its outstanding strength in advantageous disciplines, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will significantly move forward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 2907, with a range of 2576–3238.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Technology Top Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Academician Special Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Top Class, HKU Excellence Class)
- Artificial Intelligence (Zhongguancun Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Autonomous Intelligence)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Brain-Machine Intelligence)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Aerospace)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Information).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (AI Academician Special Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Autonomous Intelligent Systems Academician Special Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 2576–3238, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 top classes as a reach, and Tier 3 majors as a safe backup. Candidates near the lower end of the range (around 2576) can focus on reaching for Tier 1 Future Technology Top Class and Academician Special Class; those in the middle of the range (around 2907) should mainly consider Tier 2 majors such as Autonomous Intelligence and Future Information; those near the upper end of the range (around 3238) are advised to prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2022, the minimum ranking for liberal arts was approximately 1117→2262, with a shift of about 1145 places backward in 2022 compared to 2021, indicating significant fluctuation. Starting in 2023, the Jilin Province college entrance examination reform introduced Physics Category/History Category, and this university has no admission data for liberal arts/History Category in Jilin (missing for 2023–2025), limiting historical reference; liberal arts group enrollment plans: 15 in 2021, 14 in 2022; 2026 History Category plan: 18, a slight expansion of about 4 compared to 2022, easing competition somewhat.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class, ranked approximately 12th in Soft Science 2026, a top national engineering university; although liberal arts majors are not its main focus, they remain attractive due to the overall reputation; 2026 reputation neutral/mixed, Douyin popularity total ranking 10th (high heat), high overall attention to the university, indirectly positively influencing liberal arts major applications; strong engineering advantages (17 A- or above), liberal arts-related disciplines such as Architecture A-, Urban and Rural Planning (not separately rated), and the Economics and Management Pilot Class covering Business Administration, Accounting, etc.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Economics and Management Pilot Class (Intelligent Social Governance) is the only enrollment major in 2026, covering Business Administration, Accounting, Digital Economy, etc., with stable social popularity for management categories; total number of examinees in Jilin Province in 2026 is approximately 110,868, with an estimated 31,000 in the History Category based on a recent proportion of about 28%, roughly the same as in 2025.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2022 baseline ranking of approximately 2262, the 2026 History Category plan of 18 (a slight expansion compared to 2022), and limited recent admission data for reference, it is predicted that the 2026 minimum ranking will be roughly the same as in 2022. Predicted minimum ranking: approximately 2262, range 2004–2520.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Economics and Management Pilot Class (Intelligent Social Governance) (Business Administration, Accounting, Language Intelligence, Architecture, Urban and Rural Planning).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The liberal arts group has only one enrollment major (Economics and Management Pilot Class), and rankings within the predicted range of 2004–2520 are all eligible for application. Rankings near the lower limit of the range (around 2004) have a higher chance of admission; rankings near the upper limit (around 2520) can be considered a reach. It is recommended to list this major as the first choice.
